title: Matthew Gross | Partner | BAL Immigration Law
content:
“What I love about my work is the chance to have a positive impact on both the companies we represent and their employees.”
Matt is a Partner in BAL’s Dallas office, making his mark in corporate immigration by helping clients implement game-changing business strategies and providing tailored solutions that deliver best-in-class results. 

Matt oversees legal teams working on a portfolio of sizable immigration programs in industries such as healthcare, tech, construction, marketing and apparel. He advises his clients on a wide range of issues, such as the immigration impact of corporate reorganizations and mergers. Clients and colleagues alike appreciate Matt’s ability to connect with them and build relationships of trust. Before joining BAL, Matt worked at a boutique immigration law firm, focusing his practice on employment-based immigration matters, investor visas and worksite compliance. Matt is a member of the American Immigration Lawyers Association.
South Texas College of Law, J.D. University of Texas at Austin, B.A., Government
